tagline: Driftwave Games is a free-to-play social arcade of breezy reel games. Play spinners for fun, unwind by the tide. Nothing to purchase, ever.
hero_headline: Catch the Driftwave and Spin Somewhere Sunny
hero_intro: Kick off your sandals and let the tide do the talking. Driftwave Games is a free-to-play social hideaway where breezy reel games and easygoing spinners are always on the house.
home_lead: There's a certain hush that settles over a shoreline at golden hour, when the wind softens and the water goes glassy. That's the feeling we chase at Driftwave Games. Every reel game here is free to play, made purely for the joy of the spin, and built to slow your pulse down to the rhythm of the surf. No purchases, no pressure, no strings attached to the tide line.

home_sections.heading: Free Play, Forever Easy
home_sections.body:
Everything under our little palm-shaded roof is free-to-play, top to bottom. Our reel games and spinners cost nothing to enjoy and carry no monetary value of any kind, so you can drift in whenever the mood strikes and drift out just as gently. There is nothing to purchase and nothing of value to chase down.
Think of it like a beach picnic that never runs out of daylight. You tap a spinner, the reels roll like foam curling up the sand, and the only thing you collect is a lighter mood. We keep the whole experience breezy on purpose, because entertainment should feel like a day off, not a chore.

home_sections.heading: Games Tuned to the Tide
home_sections.body:
Our shelf holds six handcrafted reel games, each with its own coastal character, from sun-baked temple spinners to moonlit mystery reels. Every one is a casual arcade experience you can pick up in seconds and set down whenever the next wave of your day rolls in.
We fuss over the little things: the soft chime when symbols line up, the unhurried pace of each spin, the color of the light in the background. It all adds up to a calm, refreshing session that feels less like a sprint and more like wading out to where the water meets your knees. Free rounds and feature rounds appear as you play, purely for the fun of watching the reels dance.

home_sections.heading: A Community Built on Sea Breeze
home_sections.body:
Driftwave grew out of a scattered crew of makers who love the coast and love a good, gentle spin even more. We share tips, swap favorite games, and trade sunset photos across our community channels, always in that laid-back tone the shoreline seems to teach everybody.
You're welcome to pull up a chair on the sand with us. Whether you play once a season or drop by every evening as the light fades, you're part of the flotilla now. Come as you are, stay as long as the breeze feels good, and let the reels keep the mood light.

games_intro: Welcome to the boardwalk, where six free-to-play reel games sit lined up like beach umbrellas waiting for a sunny afternoon. Each spinner has its own flavor, from golden desert temples to smoky candlelit tales, and every single one is free to play with nothing of monetary value involved. Tap in, watch the reels roll like gentle surf, collect symbols as they line up, and let feature rounds wash over you at their own easy pace. There's no pressure here and nothing to purchase. Just pick the game that matches your mood and drift.
games_intro_meta: Explore six free-to-play reel games at Driftwave Games. Breezy spinners for pure fun, nothing to purchase, nothing of value at stake.

ankh-of-anubis.tagline: Wander a sun-warmed temple where golden symbols line up like desert dunes.
ankh-of-anubis.description:
Step out of the noon heat and into the cool shade of an ancient hall in Ankh of Anubis, a breezy reel game that trades the surf for shifting sands. The reels here glow like polished amber, and every spin sends hieroglyphs drifting into place with the slow grace of a river settling after the flood. It's the kind of session you can sink into while the ceiling fan lazily turns overhead.
We built Ankh of Anubis to feel like an easy afternoon of exploring, not a race. Collecting the ankh and jackal symbols triggers gentle feature rounds, and free rounds roll in like a warm evening breeze off the dunes. There's a hush to it, a golden calm, that pairs perfectly with a cold drink and bare feet. Everything is free to play, made purely for the pleasure of watching the reels turn, with nothing of monetary value anywhere in sight. Come poke around the temple, let the sand settle between your toes, and enjoy the unhurried glow of a game that never asks anything of you but your attention.
ankh-of-anubis.how_to_play: Choose your spin size, tap the button, and watch the reels roll. Matching symbols along a line collect together, and landing enough of them opens a feature round. Free rounds arrive on their own as you play. Sit back, keep spinning at your own pace, and enjoy the desert glow.

baron-lord-of-saturday.tagline: A moonlit carnival spinner draped in candle smoke and easy rhythm.
baron-lord-of-saturday.description:
When the sun dips and the tiki torches flicker to life, Baron: Lord of Saturday opens its doors. This reel game leans into a warm, festival-night mood, all candle glow and soft drumbeats, like a beach bonfire that's found its groove. The reels roll with a smoky swagger, and the whole thing feels like dancing barefoot in the sand long after the tide has gone out.
Baron: Lord of Saturday is a casual arcade spinner through and through, free to play from the first tap. As the top-hatted host and his flickering candles line up, gentle feature rounds light up the reels, and free rounds drift in like the last warm breeze of the night. There's nothing to purchase and nothing of monetary value to be found, just the easy pleasure of watching symbols fall into place under a friendly moon. We tuned every sound and shade to keep your shoulders loose and your evening breezy. Pour yourself something cool, settle into the glow, and let the Baron's carnival roll on at its own laid-back tempo for as long as you like.
baron-lord-of-saturday.how_to_play: Set your spin size and tap to start. Watch the reels roll and let matching symbols line up to collect together. Enough matches open a candlelit feature round, and free rounds appear as you play. Keep spinning at whatever pace feels good under the torchlight.

beasts-of-fire.tagline: Sunset-colored reels where warm creatures roam a glowing horizon.
beasts-of-fire.description:
Beasts of Fire captures that magic-hour moment when the sky over the water turns molten orange and everything glows. This reel game fills the screen with warm, friendly creatures and embers that drift like sparks off a shoreline bonfire. Every spin has a cozy heat to it, the good kind, the kind you feel on your skin at the end of a long sunny day.
At its heart, Beasts of Fire is an easygoing arcade spinner, free to play and made for pure fun. As the fiery beasts and glowing symbols line up across the reels, gentle feature rounds flare up, and free rounds roll in like a fresh gust off the sea. Nothing here carries monetary value, and there is nothing to purchase, ever. It's simply a warm, refreshing way to let a few minutes melt away. We designed the pacing to feel unhurried, so you can watch the embers dance without any rush. Kick back where the sand is still warm from the sun, let the reels roll, and enjoy the glow of a game that only ever asks you to relax.
beasts-of-fire.how_to_play: Pick your spin size and tap to send the reels rolling. Matching creatures and symbols collect along the lines, and gathering enough sparks a feature round. Free rounds light up on their own as you play. Take it slow, keep the embers glowing, and enjoy the sunset pace.

ace-of-spades.tagline: A cool, breezy card-themed spinner with clean lines and calm reels.
ace-of-spades.description:
Ace of Spades brings a crisp, refreshing simplicity to the boardwalk, like a clean white sail against a blue sky. This reel game keeps things elegant and uncluttered, with polished card symbols that snap into place as smoothly as a deck being shuffled on a shaded deck chair. It's the palate cleanser of our shelf, breezy and bright.
Don't let the tidy look fool you, though. Ace of Spades is a fully casual arcade spinner, free to play and packed with easy charm. As the aces and suits line up, gentle feature rounds unfold, and free rounds drift in like a cool current beneath a warm surface. There's nothing of monetary value in play and nothing to purchase, just the satisfying rhythm of clean reels rolling one after another. We kept the whole experience light and airy on purpose, so it feels like a quick dip rather than a deep dive. Whether you've got a full afternoon or just the span of a single wave, Ace of Spades is happy to keep you company. Deal yourself in, breathe easy, and let the suits fall as they may.
ace-of-spades.how_to_play: Choose your spin size and tap to roll the reels. Matching cards and suits line up to collect together, and landing enough opens a feature round. Free rounds arrive on their own as you play. Keep it easy, spin at your own tempo, and enjoy the clean rhythm.

alice-cooper-and-the-tome-of-madness.tagline: A dusk-lit, playfully spooky reel game with a mischievous grin.
alice-cooper-and-the-tome-of-madness.description:
As the light goes purple over the dunes, Alice Cooper and the Tome of Madness cracks open its pages. This reel game leans into a fun, theatrical shiver, all flickering shadows and playful gothic flair, like telling ghost stories around a driftwood fire with everyone laughing between the scary bits. It's spooky in the way a costume party is spooky: pure entertainment, never heavy.
Alice Cooper and the Tome of Madness is a free-to-play arcade spinner at its core, made for a bit of moonlit fun. As eerie symbols and inky pages line up across the reels, gentle feature rounds bubble up from the tome, and free rounds sweep in like a cool night breeze off the water. Nothing here carries monetary value and there is nothing to purchase, just the delight of watching a mischievous story unfold spin by spin. We balanced the shadows with a wink, so it stays light on its feet no matter how dark the reels look. Grab a blanket against the evening cool, turn the page, and let this playful bit of theater roll on for as long as the night feels friendly.
alice-cooper-and-the-tome-of-madness.how_to_play: Set your spin size and tap to turn the reels. Matching symbols and pages line up to collect together, and gathering enough opens a feature round. Free rounds appear on their own as you play. Keep spinning at an easy pace and enjoy the playful shadows.

agent-of-hearts.tagline: A smooth, sun-drenched spy caper spinner with a warm heartbeat.
agent-of-hearts.description:
Agent of Hearts adds a little intrigue to the shoreline, a breezy spy caper played out across sleek, sun-drenched reels. Think palm-lined boulevards, cool sunglasses, and a soundtrack that saunters rather than sprints. This reel game keeps its cool the way a seasoned traveler does, unbothered and easy, even as the story winds through one charming scene after another.
Underneath the smooth exterior, Agent of Hearts is a thoroughly casual arcade spinner, free to play and made purely for fun. As the hearts, ciphers, and gadget symbols line up, gentle feature rounds slip into view, and free rounds arrive like a well-timed convertible pulling up to the curb. There's nothing of monetary value at stake and nothing to purchase, just the relaxed pleasure of a story that unfolds at your own tempo. We wrote the pacing to feel like a leisurely coastal drive with the top down and the sea to your left. So slide into the passenger seat, let the warm wind mess up your hair, and enjoy the caper spin by easy spin, no mission too urgent to interrupt your afternoon.
agent-of-hearts.how_to_play: Pick your spin size and tap to roll the reels. Matching hearts and symbols collect along the lines, and landing enough opens a feature round. Free rounds slide in on their own as you play. Keep things cool, spin at your leisure, and enjoy the caper.

about.meta: Meet Driftwave Games, a worldwide remote crew making free-to-play reel games from coastlines and time zones all over the map.
about.story:
Driftwave Games didn't start in an office. It started in a group chat that stayed lit up around the clock, because somebody on our crew is always awake somewhere near the water. We're a remote team scattered across coastlines and time zones, the kind of outfit where a good idea gets handed off at dusk on one shore and picked up at dawn on another, following the sun like a tide that never quite goes out.
The whole thing began with a simple, sun-warmed notion: that a reel game could feel less like a race and more like a slow afternoon by the sea. A few of us had made arcade games before and grown tired of the frantic pace so many of them chase. We wanted something breezier. Something you could open on a lazy Sunday, spin a few times, and close again feeling lighter than when you sat down. Everything we build is free to play, made purely for entertainment, with nothing of monetary value anywhere in the mix.
Because we're spread across the globe, the coast is our common language. One of us watches the fog roll off the Atlantic in the morning; another catches the Pacific going pink at night; a third works to the rhythm of a warm tropical harbor where the palms never stop swaying. That range of shorelines seeps into the games. When we argue about the color of a sunset on a reel, it's because three different oceans are voting. When a spinner's rhythm feels just right, it's usually because we tuned it to the pace of somebody's evening walk along the sand.
Working this way isn't always tidy, but it keeps us honest and it keeps us calm. There's no rushing a distributed crew, and honestly, we don't want to. The handoffs across time zones force a certain patience on us, and that patience ends up baked into every game we ship. We'd rather release something that feels genuinely refreshing than something that's merely fast.
We also believe entertainment should ask nothing of you. No purchases, no pressure, nothing to chase. Just free reel games, a gentle sense of humor, and a shared love of the place where the land meets the water. If you've ever wanted a small daily ritual that feels like a deep breath of sea air, that's exactly what we set out to make. So wherever you are and whatever hour it is on your stretch of coast, there's a good chance one of us is online too, keeping the lights on and the reels rolling. Welcome to the flotilla. Pull up a chair, kick off your sandals, and drift a while.

team.name: Nina Alvarez
team.bio: Nina works from a breezy apartment where the balcony catches the last of the afternoon light, and she brings that same warm glow to every reel game she shapes. She's the one who insists a spinner should feel like an exhale, fussing over pacing and color until each session lands soft and easy. When she's not sketching temple symbols, she's usually out chasing the tide with a sketchbook.

team.name: Tobias Berg
team.bio: Tobias keeps the whole flotilla afloat from a cool northern coast where the water stays crisp year round. He's the calm hand behind the smooth spins and gentle feature rounds, quietly untangling the technical knots so nothing ever feels rushed or clunky. He swears his best code happens on early morning walks along the harbor, coffee in hand and fog rolling in.

team.name: Amara Diallo
team.role: Community Lead & Voice of the Breeze
team.bio: Amara is the friendly voice you'll meet across our community channels, working from a sun-drenched harbor town where the palms sway all day long. She keeps the whole crew connected across time zones and makes sure every player feels like part of the picnic. Ask her for a game recommendation and she'll match your mood to a spinner before you've finished your sentence.

contact.meta: Say hello to Driftwave Games. Reach our worldwide remote crew by email or drop into our easygoing community channels anytime.
contact.intro:
Got a question, a bit of feedback, or just want to say hello from your corner of the coast? We'd love to hear from you. Because our crew is scattered across time zones, there's usually somebody near enough to their morning coffee to write back.
Drop us a line by email and we'll get to it as soon as the tide allows. Whether you're curious about one of our reel games, want to share a sunset photo, or have an idea for something breezy we should build, our inbox is always open and our tone is always laid-back.
contact.community: Come hang out on our community channels for game chat, tips, and a steady stream of sunset photos.

privacy:
This privacy policy explains, in plain and breezy English, how Driftwave Games handles your information when you visit our free-to-play social gaming site. We aim to keep this as light and clear as a summer sky, because you deserve to know exactly what happens behind the scenes.
We collect very little. When you browse our site, our servers may automatically log standard technical details like your browser type, general location at the country or region level, the pages you visit, and the date and time of your visit. This helps us understand how people enjoy our reel games and keep the site running smoothly. We do not ask you to create an account to play, so we are not collecting names, passwords, or payment details, because our games are entirely free and involve nothing of monetary value.
Cookies and similar technologies help our site remember small preferences and keep your session comfortable. Some cookies are essential for the site to function, while others are optional and simply help us see which games people like most. You can adjust or clear cookies at any time through your browser settings, and the site will still work if you turn the optional ones off.
We use privacy-minded analytics to measure general traffic patterns, such as how many people visited a game page or how long a typical session lasts. This information is aggregated and is not used to identify you personally. We do not sell your information to anyone, and we do not share it except where strictly necessary to operate the site or where required by law.
If you contact us by email, we will hold your message and address only for as long as it takes to reply and follow up. We keep that correspondence tidy and delete it when it is no longer needed.
We take reasonable, sensible steps to protect the limited information we hold, though no online service can promise perfect security. We may update this policy from time to time as our little site grows, and any changes will be posted right here on this page. If you have any questions about your information or this policy, please reach out to us by email and we will happily walk you through it.
terms:
Welcome aboard, and thanks for spending a little time with Driftwave Games. These terms of use lay out the easygoing ground rules for enjoying our site. By using it, you agree to what follows, so please give it a friendly read.
Everything on Driftwave Games is free to play. Our reel games and spinners are provided purely for entertainment, and they carry no monetary value whatsoever. There is nothing of value to be gained, nothing to purchase, and nothing to collect beyond the simple fun of watching the reels roll. Please treat the whole experience as the lighthearted pastime it is meant to be, with no expectation of any financial gain of any kind.
Our site is intended for adults aged 21 and over only. By using Driftwave Games, you confirm that you meet this age requirement. If you do not, we kindly ask that you set sail elsewhere.
We ask that you use the site fairly and respectfully. Please do not attempt to tamper with, hack, overload, copy, or disrupt the site or its games, and please do not use it for any unlawful purpose. Our games, artwork, text, and branding belong to Driftwave Games and its partners, and they are provided for your personal enjoyment only, not for redistribution or resale.
We do our best to keep the site running smoothly and to keep every reel game breezy and reliable. That said, we provide the site on an as-is basis. We cannot promise it will always be available or entirely free of hiccups, and to the fullest extent allowed by law, we are not liable for any loss or inconvenience arising from your use of, or inability to use, the site.
From time to time we may update these terms as our site evolves, add new games, or refresh existing ones. When we make changes, we will post the updated terms right here on this page, so it is worth glancing back now and then. If any part of these terms is found to be unenforceable, the rest will remain fully in effect. If you have questions about anything here, just reach out by email and we will gladly help. Now go on and enjoy the surf.

testimonials.name: Suki P.
testimonials.text: I open a spinner with my morning coffee and it's become the calmest part of my whole day. The reels feel unhurried in a way most games don't, and I love that it's just pure, free fun with nothing hanging over it. The tropical vibe genuinely makes my apartment feel ten degrees warmer.

testimonials.name: Joss R.
testimonials.text: The moonlit carnival game hooked me first, but I keep drifting back for the sunset-colored one too. Everything moves at this lovely relaxed pace, so I never feel rushed. It's the closest thing to a beach afternoon I can get on a rainy weeknight.

testimonials.name: Zara T.
testimonials.text: What I appreciate most is how easy and light the whole thing feels. No pressure, nothing to buy, just breezy reel games I can dip into for five minutes or fifty. The little chime when symbols line up is weirdly soothing and I'm not even sorry about it.
